piqa_00141.B: apply toothpaste and then wipe it off with hot water.

piqa_00304.A: after extending the tape to the desired length, pull the front locking tab up until it locks into place.
piqa_00304.B: after extending the tape to the desired length, press the front locking tab down until it locks into place.

piqa_00922.B: Use a mason jar to pour liquid soap into a spray bottle.

piqa_01504.B: Tie a small knot at the speaker end of the left hand one.

piqa_01866.B: Lay on top of surf board mounted on block of wood.

piqa_02069.B: Place melon under bra cup while gluing rose petals on.

piqa_03801.A: Preheat your oven to 450 degrees. Place the wings skin side up on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Cook for about 20 minutes or the chicken is not pink in the middle.
piqa_03801.B: Preheat your oven to 450 degrees. Place the wings skin side down on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Cook for about 20 minutes or the chicken is not pink in the middle.

piqa_04666.A: Add sliced mushrooms to a skillet and add enough cooking butter to cover the bottom of the skillet then turn on the heat two medium and stir mushrooms so that they do not stick continues during into all of the fluid in the skillet is gone.
piqa_04666.B: Add sliced mushrooms to a skillet and add enough cooking Sherry to cover the bottom of the skillet then turn on the heat two medium and stir mushrooms so that they do not stick continues during into all of the fluid in the skillet is gone.

piqa_06263.A: Cut the brim off a white baseball hat, drape a sheet over the person wearing the hat, mark and cut out the eyes and nose, draw a face on the sheet, and pin the sheet to the hat with safety pins.
piqa_06263.B: Cut the brim off a white baseball hat, drape a sheet over the person wearing the hat, mark and cut out the eyes and nose, draw a face on the sheet, and pin the sheet to the head with safety pins.

piqa_06388.A: Cut through multiple layers of foil.
piqa_06388.B: Cut through multiple layers of newspaper.

piqa_07593.A: Locate gritty loose dirt outside, pick up the dirt and cover entire hands with dirt, allowing the excess dirt to fall on the ground, rub both hands together vigorously, front,back and between the fingers for a few minutes, rinse off with water from a hose outside.
piqa_07593.B: Locate clay dirt outside, pick up the dirt and cover entire hands with dirt, allowing the excess dirt to fall on the ground, rub both hands together vigorously front,back and between the fingers, rinse off with water from a hose outside.

piqa_07631.A: Get an old wooden hanger and some tea cup hooks. Screw the tea cup hooks into the bottom of the hanger. Hang necklaces.
piqa_07631.B: Get an old wooden hanger and some tea cup hooks. Screw the tea cup hooks into the top of the hanger. Hang necklaces.

piqa_09323.B: put the whole sealed can in the fridge overnight.

piqa_10004.A: Add raw beans to soil to increase pH levels.
piqa_10004.B: Add coffee grounds to soil to increase pH levels.

piqa_10292.A: Glue about 20 chopsticks together in a circle. The attach four perpendicular chopsticks across to provide support. Repeat for the other side.
piqa_10292.B: Glue about 20 chopsticks together in a line. The attach four perpendicular chopsticks across to provide support. Repeat for the other side.

piqa_10680.B: cut out from your ice tray

piqa_11478.A: Make the sides, the front and the bottom of the bus by drawing a cartoon design on a plywood sheet and cutting them out. Attach the sides to the front and the back using nails and screws to form a box in the shape of a bus.
piqa_11478.B: Make the sides, the front and the back of the bus by drawing a cartoon design on a plywood sheet and cutting them out. Attach the sides to the front and the back using nails and screws to form a box in the shape of a bus.

piqa_13154.A: Pass egg back and forth between hands with spread fingers.
piqa_13154.B: Pass egg back and forth between hands with closed fingers.

piqa_15243.B: heat it up in the oven until it's soft enough to ply.
